short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $2.71B in FY2026 Q1, +35.2% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $2.12B (-21.8% vs current Q) — set by 26 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $0.72.
Margin context: 37.7% net margin (1.0% op margin) — expansion likely.
Next earnings: 2026-08-04 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is constructive — consensus is achievable based on current run-rate.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $10B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $8B → FY2 $10B (+15.9% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 28.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +36.9% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Information Technology): Multi-year AI/cloud capex cycle remains the dominant secular theme.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if growth durability + margin expansion both hold.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · positioning window)
bullets: Price $154.03 vs SMA200 $139.80 (+10.2%) — long-term trend is in **uptrend intact**.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 67.7% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 1.01 — balanced flow.
30-day implied move: ±12.1% ($135.44 – $172.62) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -7.28pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $150.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Sell 30–45 DTE cash-secured put at $146 (5% OTM). High IV (68%) + uptrend → collect premium with a willingness to be assigned at a discount. Roll if breached, otherwise let theta decay.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 55.2% across 9 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 9 dates spanning 91–609 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±27.4% ($111.84 – $196.22).
391-day implied move: ±57.9% ($64.83 – $243.23) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $110 (-28.6% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-12.5pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $139 put / short $169 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
